story.text:
# 💡 C82 · The Moving Ceiling R(t)
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Frontier capability growth raises C_S(t)+C_M(t) against fixed archives without raising H(X); R(t) drifts upward and every static reconstruction guarantee has a finite shelf life t*. Active (65% · Run 1).

## Edges in

- [[the Agentprivacy Edge (prediction)]] *references* →
- [[C84 · Existence-Leak Discount]] *relates_to* →
- [[Overlap Note · Key-Forging × V6]] *references* →
